g.text: Parlay Group Betting - Association Detection Logic (4 Criteria)
- Bet on same 3 matches in last 7 days

Get association result:
[{CustID: 5001, GroupID: 1},
 {CustID: 5002, GroupID: 1},
 {CustID: 5003, GroupID: 2},
 {CustID: 5004, GroupID: 0},
Parse CustGroup JSON into Temp_CustGroup table
Call Process SP again with new CustGroup
Some customers may not be detected
in Round 1 due to timing or partial data.
Group by TransIDList to avoid duplicates
Key Differences from Standard Group Betting:
- Parlay has single rule for all sports
